creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: analyzed->closed


OBE. Also, the correct way to add support for BIND 10 will 
be to split it into at least 3 ports, something like: 

-core for the common components 
-auth for the authoritative-only bits 
-resolver for the resolver-only bits 

... possibly with more ports for other unique features.
